text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Awww, too bad. If you couldn't get one...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I guess that just means you don't love me enough.

text_block_list.text: I guess that just means you don't love me enough.

text_block_list.text:

best. So...
